work.title: IT Cybersecurity Specialist
work.org: Department of Justice — U.S. Trustee Program
work.description: Provided cybersecurity oversight across DOJ mission-critical systems. Implemented enterprise security protocols, incident response procedures, and DLP strategies aligned with NIST frameworks. Led integration and quality assurance for cloud infrastructure and application deployments.
bullets: Provided cybersecurity oversight across DOJ mission-critical systems.
Implemented enterprise security protocols, incident response procedures, and DLP strategies aligned with NIST frameworks.
Led integration and quality assurance for cloud infrastructure and application deployments.

work.title: Summer Research Program Intern
work.description: Designed software and hardware methodologies to evaluate cybersecurity resiliency of control systems and infrastructure interfaces. Developed protocol parsers for ICS and proprietary network protocols to improve monitoring and defense.

work.title: Cybersecurity Research Intern
work.description: Analyzed cybersecurity risks for NASA's Next Generation Network (NGN), focusing on integrating commercial cloud platforms. Reviewed and adapted methods to align with NIST 800-53/800-171 for NGN architecture.

work.title: Cybersecurity Intern
work.description: Executed critical service updates with cybersecurity best practices. Integrated modern technologies to improve infrastructure agility. Leveraged Teleport, ThreatConnect, and OpenShift to fortify infrastructure security.
bullets: Coordinated essential service updates, patching, and emergency response work with the infrastructure team.
Researched and integrated technologies to modernize infrastructure while preserving reliability.
Used OpenShift, Teleport, and ThreatConnect to support secure development and infrastructure integrity.

work.title: Senior Cybersecurity Intern
work.description: Developed and implemented security protocols for NASA's SCaN Cloud in alignment with federal policies and standards. Produced security artifacts and documentation to support independent assessments.
bullets: Supported development and security compliance for NASA's SCaN Cloud infrastructure.
Prepared security artifacts, user documentation, and capability materials for assessment readiness.
Improved communication between technical teams and users through clearer security documentation.

work.title: Information Security Intern
work.description: Conducted application security assessments using DAST/SAST tools (OWASP ZAP, Burp Suite, Checkmarx, Acunetix) mapped to MITRE ATT&CK. Led offensive assessments and penetration tests on communication platforms. Used Splunk and Zscaler in red-team exercises.
bullets: Performed application security assessments on internal applications using DAST and SAST tooling.
Used tools including Burp Suite, Acunetix, OWASP ZAP, and Checkmarx to identify and validate findings.
Participated in red-team exercises using Splunk and Zscaler.

work.title: Tech Fellow
work.description: Led and taught the Cybersecurity course at the University of Maryland. Conducted weekly sessions, organized learning material, and mentored students in defensive application security.
bullets: Led and taught the cybersecurity course for the Fall 2021 semester at the University of Maryland.
Taught security fundamentals, common application vulnerabilities, and defensive application development.
Ran weekly class sessions and office hours while coordinating student progress with CodePath staff.

work.title: Cryptography Intern
work.description: Implemented CCSDS SDLS-EP to secure spacecraft-ground communications via NOS3. Analyzed cryptographic mechanisms and mission requirements for space-system communications.
bullets: Delivered a software-based SDLS-EP implementation for secure spacecraft-ground communication in NOS3.
Studied mission architecture and cryptography standards before integrating a proprietary cryptography library.
Used Git to manage the project software development lifecycle and version control.

work.title: Security Intern
work.description: Developed advanced security capabilities for NCCS and assessed security compliance across infrastructure, operational areas, and service layers. Evaluated compliance metrics and alternative solutions for security monitoring.
bullets: Developed enhanced security capabilities for the NASA Center for Climate Simulation.
Evaluated compliance technologies, metrics collection approaches, and alternative monitoring solutions.
Assessed security needs across NCCS infrastructure, operational areas, and service layers.

work.title: Networking / System Administration Intern
work.description: Configured advanced network devices and managed diverse OS/hardware used in NASA infrastructure. Deployed a secure, service-rich private network infrastructure.
bullets: Configured network devices including federally compliant switches and firewalls.
Worked with Linux, Windows, virtualization, containerization, and access-control technologies.
Deployed a secure private network infrastructure for intern knowledge sharing.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
highlights: Minors: Cybersecurity (ACES), Science, Technology, Ethics & Policy
FIRE Program: AI & Deep Learning, Capital One ML stream
Cybersecurity Club Secretary, NCL Team, NCCDC Team

publications.title: SocialCipher: A Multimodal Framework for Proactive Threat Detection with SentIntel
publications.description: Co-authored paper on proactive cyber threat detection using sentiment analysis and LLMs. Research conducted at MIT Lincoln Laboratory.

publications.title: Geneva — Protocol Obfuscation Research
publications.description: Researching utilization of Text-to-Speech quirks for practical applications in circumventing censorship detection mechanisms. Establishing baselines for detectability vs throughput optimization.

publications.title: Cyber Threat Intelligence Research
publications.description: Spearheaded threat intelligence on APTs 40 and 41. Developed comprehensive threat profiles and delivered high-impact briefing to NSA leadership with actionable intelligence.
